common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to batch initiate logistics including arrange pickup, dropoff or shipment for non-integrated logistic channels. Should call v2.logistics.get_shipping_parameter to fetch all required param first. It's recommended to initiate logistics one hour after the orders were placed since there is one-hour window buyer can cancel any order without request to seller.Only channel 90003 - Padrão in Brazil has the permission of this API.

children.name: order_sn
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order. Limit 150.

children.name: package_number
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order. You should't fill the field with empty string when there is't a package number.

request_params.name: pickup

children.name: address_id
children.description: The identity of address. Retrieved from shopee.logistics.GetAddress.

children.name: pickup_time_id
children.description: The pickup time id. Retrieved from shopee.logistics.GetTimeSlot.

children.name: tracking_number
children.description: Need input this field when "tracking_number" is returned from "info_need". Please note that this tracking number is assigned by third-party shipping carrier for item shipment.

request_params.description: Required parameter ONLY if GetParameterForInit returns "pickup" or if GetLogisticsInfo returns "pickup" under "info_needed" for the same order. Developer should still include "pickup" field in the call even if "pickup" has empty value.

request_params.name: dropoff

children.name: branch_id
children.description: The identity of branch. Retrieved from shopee.logistics.GetBranch branch.

children.name: tracking_number
children.description: Need input this field when "tracking_number" is returned from "info_need". Please note that this tracking number is assigned by third-party shipping carrier for item shipment.

request_params.description: Required parameter ONLY if GetParameterForInit returns "dropoff" or if GetLogisticsInfo returns "dropoff" under "info_needed" for the same order. Developer should still include "dropoff" field in the call even if "dropoff" has empty value. For logistic_id 80003 and 80004, both Regular and JOB shipping methods are supported. If you choose Regular shipping method, please use "tracking_no" to call Init API. If you choose JOB shipping method, please use "sender_real_name" to call Init API. Note that only one of "tracking_no" and "sender_real_name" can be selected.

request_params.name: non_integrated

children.name: tracking_number
children.description: Optional parameter for non-integrated channel order. The tracking number assigned by the shipping carrier for item shipment.

request_params.description: Optional parameter when GetParameterForInit returns "non-integrated" or GetLogisticsInfo returns "non-integrated" under "info_needed".

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
Indicate warning message you should take care.
response_params.name: warning

children.name: order_sn
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order.

children.name: package_number
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order. You should't fill the field with empty string when there is't a package number.

children.name: order_sn
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order.

children.name: package_number
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order.

children.name: fail_error
children.description: Indicate error type if one element hit error.

children.name: fail_message
children.description: Indicate error details if one element hit error.

value.message: Wrong parameters, detail: order_list is a required field.
